title: Finite Graph Search Runtime Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite graph search LIA/Bool regression slice
solver_reuse.pressure: BFS/DFS finite traversal counts and false traversal-cost bound rejection.
solver_reuse.next_step: Encode traversal-cost counters as bounded LIA/Bool fixtures while leaving asymptotic runtime under Lean horizon.

graduation_criteria: Encode ordered finite graphs, source/target pairs, and traversal cost counters as deterministic data.
Replay BFS and DFS visited-node counts from the graph, not from prose.
Emit checked finite counterexample evidence for false traversal-cost bounds.
Keep asymptotic complexity, lower bounds, heuristic search, and average-case runtime claims marked Lean-horizon until proof artifacts exist.
